title: 🦞 Discord - OpenClaw
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# Discord. # ​ Discord (Bot API). ## Channel troubleshooting. ## ​ Quick setup. Create a Discord application and bot. `openclaw config set channels.discord.token '"YOUR_BOT_TOKEN"' --json. openclaw config set channels.discord.enabled true --json. openclaw pairing approve discord <CODE>`. ## ​ Recommended: Set up a guild workspace. ## ​ Runtime model. `agent:<agentId>:discord:channel:<channelId>`. `channels.discord.dm.groupEnabled=false`. `agent:<agentId>:discord:slash:<userId>`. ## ​ Forum channels. `openclaw message send --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. `openclaw message thread create --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. ## ​ Interactive components. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. ## ​ Native commands and command auth. `channels.discord.dms["<user_id>"].historyLimit`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.ackReaction`. | reactions, messages, threads, pins, polls, search, memberInfo, roleInfo, channelInfo, channels, voiceStatus, events, stickers, emojiUploads, stickerUploads, permissions | enabled |. ## ​ Components v2 UI. `channels.discord.ui.components.accentColor`. `channels.discord.accounts.<id>.ui.components.accentColor`. ## ​ Voice channels. `channels.discord.voice.enabled=false`. ## ​ Voice messages. `message(action="send", channel="discord", target="channel:123", path="/path/to/audio.mp3", asVoice=true)`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.eventQueue.listenerTimeout`. `channels.discord.dm.enabled=false`. `channels.discord.voice.daveEncryption=true`. `channels.discord.voice.decryptionFailureTolerance=24`. `discord voice: DAVE decrypt failures detected`. `discord voice: repeated decrypt failures; attempting rejoin`. ## ​ Configuration reference pointers. ## ​ Safety and operations. ## ​ Related.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw: Your Step-by-Step Guide to Seamless Telegram Integration - Oreate AI
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# Unlocking OpenClaw: Your Step-by-Step Guide to Seamless Telegram Integration. OpenClaw orchestrates everything, but the real 'thinking' and 'doing' comes from the AI models it connects to. If you've got a Mac mini, it's fantastic for keeping OpenClaw running 24/7 as a dedicated AI host. Next, you'll need an AI model. ### Getting OpenClaw Installed: The Technical Bits. Before we install OpenClaw itself, we need to set up its environment. The recommended path is Homebrew -> fnm -> Node.js -> OpenClaw. **Install Node.js**: OpenClaw officially recommends Node.js version 22. **Install OpenClaw**: The final installation step is simple: `npm i -g openclaw`. To connect OpenClaw with Telegram, you need a special token. **Verify the Connection**: Open Telegram, find your newly created bot, and send it a message like `/start` or 'Hello'. Go back to your Terminal and run: `openclaw pairing approve telegram PAIR-ABC123` (replace `PAIR-ABC123` with your actual code). You've successfully connected OpenClaw to Telegram. `openclaw pairing approve telegram PAIR-ABC123`. Open your Terminal and run `openclaw configure`.

title: 🦞 From Chat App to AI Powerhouse: Telegram + OpenClaw - Medium
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

In this guide, we’ll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After configuring your model, OpenClaw will ask you to select a chat channel. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

title: 🦞 Cron Job Lifecycle - OpenClaw Automation & Workflows - Stanza
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron jobs in OpenClaw let you schedule tasks that execute at specific times or intervals without manual intervention. Unlike heartbeats which follow a fixed checklist, cron jobs are individual scheduled tasks with their own timing, payload, and execution context. This lesson covers how to create cron jobs and the different timing and payload options available. * **openclaw cron add**: The CLI command to create a new scheduled job. These two jobs have different schedules and payloads, but both are managed through the same cron system with simple CLI commands. Creating a cron job uses the `openclaw cron add` command with one of three timing options. For schedules that do not fit a simple interval, use standard cron expression syntax:. If you forget to use --every or --cron for recurring tasks, the job will execute once and never run again. * `openclaw cron add` creates scheduled jobs with three timing options: --at (one-time), --every (interval), --cron (expression).

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Jobs: Complete Command Reference with Examples
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.
